title: LED Rechargeable Work Light Portable Floodlight 10W USB Battery Light Super Bright 2000LM Waterproof Outdoor Stand Work Lamp for Car Garage Camping Fishing Hiking Workshop Garden
features: Super Bright & Energy Saving: Brightness equal to the 100W halogen bulb, save 90% on electric lighting. Over-Charging protection, 360°Rotation Portable light with stand design, more convenient to use for Outdoor/ Indoor. With CE Certification.

Long Battery Life & IP65 Waterproof: Adopted the special chips make floodlights last long lifespan than others, keep outdoor lighting safe and reliable. IP65 Waterproof performance to prevent the lamp into water, work normally in all weather even in rainy or snowing days.

High Quality & 2 Charging Ways: Continuously work over 6 hours lighting once charged full. Heat conducted by Aluminum fin heat sink, Long-Lasting heat, to ensure long-term stable operation of the product. Included Rechargeable battery, Main adapter and Car charger, meet your various charging demands for light.

Easy to Use & 360°Rotation: One self locking screw designed help you to disassemble the bracket without using any tools. The spotlight range is adjustable, non-slip handle well protects your hands. Perfect for BBQ , travel, camping, fishing, craftsman, Workshops, repair car or emergency light.

2 Years Warranty & 100% Satisfaction Guarantee : We are offering a FREE 24 months guarantee with every purchase ! If it breaks within 24 months of your purchase,just freely contact us and we will replace it for FREE ! Customer 100% satisfaction is paramount to us.
